title: CentOs8 test failures
body:
See:
```console
[root@centos8 test_regress]#make test
……
==SUMMARY: Passed 2325  Failed 17  Skipped 160  Unsup 30  Time 180:09
==SUMMARY: Passed 2325  Failed 17  Skipped 160  Unsup 30  Time 180:09

======================================================================
        #dist/t_a4_examples: %Error: Exec of make -C ../examples/cmake_hello_c failed:
                make && test_regress/t/t_a4_examples.pl  --dist
        #dist/t_dist_manifest: %Error: Files mismatch with manifest: removed_la_files.txt
                make && test_regress/t/t_dist_manifest.pl  --dist
        #vlt/t_savable_open_bad2: %Error: Exec of obj_vlt/t_savable_open_bad2/Vt_savable_open_bad2 failed: %Error: /tmp/root/src/test_regress/t/t_savable_open_bad2.cpp:31: GOT = 1   EXP = 0
                make && test_regress/t/t_savable_open_bad2.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_time_vpi_100s10ms: %Error: Line 6 miscompares; obj_vlt/t_time_vpi_100s10ms/vlt_sim.log != t/t_time_vpi_100s10ms.out
                make && test_regress/t/t_time_vpi_100s10ms.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_time_vpi_10ms10ns: %Error: Line 13 miscompares; obj_vlt/t_time_vpi_10ms10ns/vlt_sim.log != t/t_time_vpi_10ms10ns.out
                make && test_regress/t/t_time_vpi_10ms10ns.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_time_vpi_1fs1fs: %Error: Line 13 miscompares; obj_vlt/t_time_vpi_1fs1fs/vlt_sim.log != t/t_time_vpi_1fs1fs.out
                make && test_regress/t/t_time_vpi_1fs1fs.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_time_vpi_1ms10ns: %Error: Line 13 miscompares; obj_vlt/t_time_vpi_1ms10ns/vlt_sim.log != t/t_time_vpi_1ms10ns.out
                make && test_regress/t/t_time_vpi_1ms10ns.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_time_vpi_1ns1ns: %Error: Line 13 miscompares; obj_vlt/t_time_vpi_1ns1ns/vlt_sim.log != t/t_time_vpi_1ns1ns.out
                make && test_regress/t/t_time_vpi_1ns1ns.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_time_vpi_1ps1fs: %Error: Line 13 miscompares; obj_vlt/t_time_vpi_1ps1fs/vlt_sim.log != t/t_time_vpi_1ps1fs.out
                make && test_regress/t/t_time_vpi_1ps1fs.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_time_vpi_1us1ns: %Error: Line 13 miscompares; obj_vlt/t_time_vpi_1us1ns/vlt_sim.log != t/t_time_vpi_1us1ns.out
                make && test_regress/t/t_time_vpi_1us1ns.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_wrapper_legacy: %Error: Exec of obj_vlt/t_wrapper_legacy/Vt_wrapper_legacy failed: -V{t0,1}- Verilated::debug is on. Message prefix indicates {<thread>,<sequence_number>}.
                make && test_regress/t/t_wrapper_legacy.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_wrapper_legacy_time64: %Error: Exec of obj_vlt/t_wrapper_legacy_time64/Vt_wrapper_legacy_time64 failed: -V{t0,1}- Verilated::debug is on. Message prefix indicates {<thread>,<sequence_number>}.
                make && test_regress/t/t_wrapper_legacy_time64.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_wrapper_legacy_timed: %Error: Exec of obj_vlt/t_wrapper_legacy_timed/Vt_wrapper_legacy_timed failed: -V{t0,1}- Verilated::debug is on. Message prefix indicates {<thread>,<sequence_number>}.
                make && test_regress/t/t_wrapper_legacy_timed.pl  --vlt
        #vltmt/t_gantt: %Error: Exec of obj_vltmt/t_gantt/Vt_gantt failed: %Warning: vltmt/t_gantt: Exec failed with core dump
                make && test_regress/t/t_gantt.pl  --vltmt
        #vltmt/t_wrapper_legacy: %Error: Exec of obj_vltmt/t_wrapper_legacy/Vt_wrapper_legacy failed: -V{t1,1}- Verilated::debug is on. Message prefix indicates {<thread>,<sequence_number>}.
                make && test_regress/t/t_wrapper_legacy.pl  --vltmt
        #vltmt/t_wrapper_legacy_time64: %Error: Exec of obj_vltmt/t_wrapper_legacy_time64/Vt_wrapper_legacy_time64 failed: -V{t1,1}- Verilated::debug is on. Message prefix indicates {<thread>,<sequence_number>}.
                make && test_regress/t/t_wrapper_legacy_time64.pl  --vltmt
        #vltmt/t_wrapper_legacy_timed: %Error: Exec of obj_vltmt/t_wrapper_legacy_timed/Vt_wrapper_legacy_timed failed: -V{t1,1}- Verilated::debug is on. Message prefix indicates {<thread>,<sequence_number>}.
               make && test_regress/t/t_wrapper_legacy_timed.pl  --vltmt
……
```
Can anyone fix the bug that occurs during make test?
### Information on your system
* **Python:** 3.6.8
* **Platform:** linux-centos8-aarch64
* **Concretizer:** original
<!-- Please include the output of `spack debug report` -->

<!-- If you have any relevant configuration detail (custom `packages.yaml` or `modules.yaml`, etc.) you can add that here as well. -->
